personalInfo.name: Hussein Rajab
personalInfo.tagline: Building scalable web applications and solving real-world problems
personalInfo.bio: I am a first-year Informatics Engineering student with a strong focus on full-stack development, AI prompt engineering, and graphics design. I build practical solutions such as e-commerce platforms and educational systems.

about.description: I am a developer focused on building scalable web applications and educational platforms. My work combines full-stack development, problem solving, and system design to create impactful solutions.

focusAreas.title: Web Development
focusAreas.description: Building full-stack web applications using modern technologies like React, Node.js, and Flask.

focusAreas.description: Designing APIs, managing databases, and handling application logic for scalable systems.

focusAreas.title: Problem Solving
focusAreas.description: Teaching and applying algorithmic thinking using C++, mathematics, and logic.

focusAreas.title: Educational Platforms
focusAreas.description: Developing systems for managing courses, students, and learning content.

education.description: Focusing on full-stack development using Flask, Node.js, and MongoDB, with an interest in building scalable real-world applications.

Handled media content including videos, files, and flashcards
